c74object.name: tap.semitone2ratio
c74object.digest: Convert units from semitones to a frequency ratio
c74object.description: The tap.semitone2ratio object is a simple utility for converting units in the frequency domain: ratio = 2^(semitones/12). Send a number or a list of numbers; a bang re-outputs the last conversion. Useful for driving the ratio of tap.shift~ or the transposition-related controls of tap.pitchaccum~ in musical units.

method.name: float
method.description: Semitones to convert to a frequency ratio.

method.name: int
method.description: Semitones to convert to a frequency ratio.

method.name: list
method.description: A list of semitone values, converted element-wise to ratios.
